title: DonutSMP Anti Leak Texturepack
description: Prevents you from leaking your base by Hiding ores,Bedrock,tuff...
body:
DonutSMP Base Protection Texture Pack

revents leaking your base in screenshots/videos
Hides ores (diamond, gold, iron, etc.)
Hides bedrock
Hides tuff and other unique blocks
Makes underground look generic
Removes seed-specific terrain clues
Good for recording / streaming on DonutSMP
Keeps your base location harder to trace

Prevents accidental base leaks by removing identifiable underground blocks. This pack hides ores, bedrock, tuff, and other unique terrain markers that can reveal your base location in screenshots, videos, or streams. All suspicious blocks are replaced with neutral textures so your surroundings look generic and untraceable. Ideal for DonutSMP players who want to record or share gameplay without exposing coordinates or seed-specific terrain.
